bindingBanner.title: English version is binding
bindingBanner.body: This page is provided in your language as a courtesy. The English version of this document is the legally binding text. In case of any conflict or ambiguity, the English version prevails.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.summary1: We collect your name, email, and account info to provide the platform.
privacy.summary2: Payments are processed by Razorpay; we never store full card numbers.
privacy.summary3: We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy.summary4: You can request access, correction, or deletion of your data at any time.
privacy.summary5: Data is encrypted in transit and protected with industry-standard security.

s1.p: Flomerce ("we", "our", "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our platform at {{domain}} and any websites created through our Service. This policy applies to all users of the Flomerce platform, including store owners and their customers.

s2.personalLead: When you register for an account, we collect:
s2.paymentP: When you subscribe to a paid plan, payment processing is handled securely by Razorpay, which is PCI DSS Level 1 compliant. We do not store your credit card numbers, debit card details, UPI IDs, or bank account information on our servers. Razorpay processes and stores payment information in accordance with their own privacy policy and security standards. We only store transaction reference IDs for record-keeping.
s2.contentP: We store the content you create on your websites, including product listings, images, category information, site configuration data, and customer order information.
s2.autoLead: We may automatically collect certain information when you access the Service, including:

s3.lead: We use the information we collect to:

items.i1: Provide, maintain, and improve the Service
items.i2: Process your subscription payments via Razorpay
items.i3: Send you account-related communications (verification emails, password resets, subscription updates)
items.i4: Respond to your inquiries and provide customer support
items.i5: Monitor and analyze usage patterns to improve user experience
items.i6: Protect against fraudulent or unauthorized activity
items.i7: Comply with legal obligations including the Information Technology Act, 2000 and applicable data protection regulations

s4.lead: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We may share your information only in the following circumstances:

items.i1Text: With Razorpay to process subscription and transaction payments securely
items.i2Text: With Cloudflare for hosting, content delivery, and database services
items.i3Text: With Brevo (formerly Sendinblue) for transactional email delivery
items.i4Text: When required by law, regulation, court order, or legal process
items.i5Text: To protect the rights, property, or safety of Flomerce, our users, or others

s5.lead: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information, including:

items.i1: Encryption of data in transit using SSL/TLS (HTTPS)

s5.tail: However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

s6.p: We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you the Service. If you delete your account, we will delete your personal data within 30 days, except where retention is required by law or for legitimate business purposes such as fraud prevention. Transaction records may be retained for up to 7 years as required by Indian tax and accounting regulations.

items.i1: Access the personal information we hold about you
items.i3: Request deletion of your account and associated data
items.i4: Withdraw consent for data processing where applicable
items.i5: Export your data in a portable format
items.i6: Lodge a complaint with a data protection authority

s7.tail: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at <email>{{email}}</email> or call <phone>{{phone}}</phone>.

s8.p: We use essential cookies and local storage to maintain your login session and store user preferences. We do not use third-party tracking cookies for advertising purposes. Essential cookies are necessary for the functioning of the Service and cannot be disabled.

s9.p: Our Service may contain links to third-party websites or services. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these third parties. We encourage you to review the privacy policies of any third-party sites you visit.

s10.p: The Service is not intended for individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware that we have collected information from a child, we will take steps to delete it promptly.

s11.p: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last updated" date. We will notify registered users of significant changes via email. Your continued use of the Service after any changes constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.

privacy.contactIntro: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.summary1: By using Flomerce you agree to these terms; you must be 18 or older.
terms.summary2: Subscription fees are billed in advance through Razorpay; prices are in INR.
terms.summary3: Flomerce is a SaaS platform — we do not handle payments made on your customers' websites; each merchant uses their own Razorpay account.
terms.summary4: You own your content; you may not sell illegal, prohibited, or restricted goods.
terms.summary5: Indian law governs this agreement; disputes go to courts in Karnataka, India.

s1.p: By accessing or using the Flomerce platform ("Service"), available at {{domain}}, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions ("Terms"). If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, you may not use our Service. These Terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Flomerce.

s2.p: Flomerce is a software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform that enables users to create, manage, and host e-commerce websites on subdomains of {{domain}} (e.g., your-store.{{domain}}). The platform provides website building tools, product management, order processing, customer management, analytics, and payment integration capabilities. Flomerce is a digital product — no physical goods are shipped by Flomerce. Access to all platform features is granted immediately upon successful payment or trial activation.

s3.p: To use the Service, you must create an account by providing accurate and complete information including your full name, email address, and a secure password. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately at {{email}} of any unauthorized use of your account. You must be at least 18 years of age to create an account.

s4.p1: Flomerce offers various subscription plans with different features and pricing, viewable on our website. By subscribing to a paid plan, you agree to pay the applicable fees as described at the time of purchase. All payments are processed securely through Razorpay, a PCI DSS-compliant payment gateway. Subscription fees are billed in advance on a recurring basis depending on your chosen billing cycle. All prices are displayed in Indian Rupees (INR). Razorpay supports payments via credit cards, debit cards, UPI, net banking, and digital wallets. Standard payment gateway transaction fees as charged by Razorpay (currently 2% per transaction for most payment methods) may apply and are borne by Flomerce for platform subscription payments. These rates are determined by Razorpay and may change; refer to the Razorpay pricing page for current rates.

s5.lead: Flomerce operates as a standard merchant and is not a payment aggregator, facilitator, or intermediary. The platform handles two distinct types of payments:

items.i1Text: Fees paid by website owners for Flomerce subscription plans (Starter, Growth, Pro, etc.) are collected directly by Flomerce through its own Razorpay merchant account. These are payments for Flomerce's SaaS services only.
items.i2Text: Payments made by end customers on websites created through Flomerce are processed entirely through the website owner's own, independently registered Razorpay merchant account. Website owners are required to obtain their own Razorpay account, complete their own KYC verification, and enter their own API credentials in their website dashboard settings.

s5.p1: Flomerce does not collect, hold, pool, settle, or route any payments on behalf of website owners or their customers. All transaction funds flow directly from the customer to the website owner's Razorpay account. Flomerce has no access to or control over these funds at any point.
s5.respLead: Each website owner is solely responsible for:

resp.i1: Maintaining their own valid Razorpay merchant account and KYC compliance
resp.i2: Securing their own API keys and credentials
resp.i3: Handling refunds, disputes, and chargebacks for their own website transactions
resp.i4: Complying with all applicable payment regulations, including RBI guidelines on digital payments

s5.p2: Payment gateway transaction fees charged by Razorpay on website customer payments (e.g., 2% per transaction) are applied to the website owner's Razorpay account as per their own agreement with Razorpay. Flomerce does not charge any additional commission or processing fee on these transactions.
s5.p3: Razorpay API keys entered by website owners are stored securely in encrypted form and are used solely for processing transactions on their respective websites. Flomerce does not share, transfer, or use one merchant's credentials for any other purpose.

s6.p: We offer a 7-day free trial period for new users. During the trial period, you have full access to the platform features at no cost. No payment information is required to start a free trial. At the end of the trial, your account will be suspended and your website will be disabled unless you subscribe to a paid plan. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the free trial at any time.

s7.p: Flomerce is a digital SaaS product. No physical goods are shipped by Flomerce. Upon successful payment or trial activation, access to the platform and all included features is granted immediately. Your e-commerce website will be live and accessible at your chosen subdomain (your-store.{{domain}}) within seconds of creation.

s8.p: You retain ownership of all content you upload to your websites created through Flomerce, including but not limited to product images, descriptions, logos, and text. You are solely responsible for ensuring that your content does not violate any applicable laws, infringe upon intellectual property rights, or contain prohibited material. You grant Flomerce a limited, non-exclusive license to host and display your content as necessary to provide the Service.

s9.lead: You agree not to use the Service to:

items.i1: Sell illegal, counterfeit, or prohibited goods
items.i2: Engage in fraudulent activities or misleading practices
items.i3: Distribute malware, viruses, or harmful code
items.i4: Violate any applicable laws or regulations
items.i5: Infringe upon the intellectual property rights of others
items.i7: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the Service or its systems
items.i8: Sell products related to gambling, adult content, cryptocurrency, or any other restricted category

s10.p: The Flomerce platform, including its design, code, features, and branding, is the intellectual property of Flomerce and is protected by applicable copyright and trademark laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or reverse-engineer any part of the Service without prior written consent.

s11.p: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time if you violate these Terms or engage in activities that are harmful to the Service or other users. Upon termination, your access to the Service will be revoked. Your website data will be retained for 30 days after termination, during which you may request data export. After this period, data may be permanently deleted.

s12.p: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Flomerce shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, data, or business opportunities, arising out of or in connection with the use of the Service. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you in the preceding 12 months.

s13.p: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not guarantee that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or secure at all times. We strive for 99.9% uptime but do not guarantee it.

s14.p: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India. Any disputes arising out of these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Karnataka, India. Before initiating legal proceedings, both parties agree to attempt resolution through good-faith negotiation.

s15.p: We reserve the right to update these Terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last updated" date. We will notify registered users of significant changes via email. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

terms.contactIntro: If you have any questions about these Terms & Conditions, please contact us at:

refund.title: Refund & Cancellation Policy
refund.summary1: Flomerce is a digital service activated immediately upon payment.
refund.summary2: New subscribers can request a full refund within 7 days of first payment.
refund.summary3: Cancellation stops future renewals; the current period stays active until it ends.
refund.summary4: Duplicate charges and failed activations are refunded automatically.
refund.summary5: To request a refund, email support with your transaction ID.

s1.p: This Refund & Cancellation Policy outlines the terms under which you may cancel your subscription and request a refund for the Flomerce platform services. Flomerce is a digital SaaS product — no physical goods are shipped. Access to the platform is granted immediately upon successful payment. We aim to be fair and transparent in our refund process.

s2.p: Flomerce is a software-as-a-service platform. All services are delivered digitally via the internet. Upon successful payment, access to your subscription plan and all included features is activated immediately. There is no physical shipment involved in any of our services.

s3.p: Flomerce offers a 7-day free trial for new users. During the trial period, you have full access to the platform features at no cost. No payment information is required to start a free trial. At the end of the trial, your account will be suspended and your website will be disabled unless you choose to subscribe to a paid plan.

s4.lead: You may cancel your subscription at any time from your dashboard. Upon cancellation:

items.i1: Your subscription will remain active until the end of the current billing period
items.i2: You will not be charged for the next billing cycle
items.i3: Your websites will continue to function until the subscription period ends
items.i4: After the subscription expires, your account will be suspended and your website will be disabled
items.i5: Your data will be retained for 30 days after expiry, during which you can resubscribe to restore access

s5.lead: Refunds may be issued under the following conditions:

items.i1Text: If you are not satisfied with the Service within the first 7 days of your initial paid subscription, you may request a full refund
items.i2Text: If the Service experiences significant downtime (more than 24 consecutive hours) or is unavailable for an extended period due to issues on our end, you may be eligible for a prorated refund
items.i3Text: If you are charged more than once for the same billing period, the duplicate charge will be refunded immediately
items.i4Text: If your subscription payment was processed but the service was not activated, you are eligible for a full refund

s6.lead: Refunds will not be issued in the following cases:

items.i1: After 7 days from the initial payment for first-time subscribers
items.i2: If your account was suspended or terminated due to violation of our Terms & Conditions
items.i3: For partial months or unused portions of a subscription (beyond the 7-day window)
items.i4: If you simply forgot to cancel before the renewal date
items.i5: For any add-on services or one-time purchases already delivered
items.i6: For renewal payments on existing subscriptions (cancellation stops future charges but does not refund the current period)

s7.lead: To request a refund, please follow these steps:

steps.i2: Include your registered email address and the reason for the refund
steps.i3: Provide the transaction ID or payment reference number if available

s7.phoneLinePre: Alternatively, you can call us at
s7.phoneLinePost: during business hours (Mon–Sat, 10 AM – 6 PM IST).
s7.ack: We will acknowledge your request within 24 hours and complete the review within 3–5 business days.

items.i1: The refund will be processed through Razorpay to the original payment method (credit card, debit card, UPI, net banking, or wallet)
items.i2: Refunds typically take 5–7 business days to appear in your account, depending on your bank or payment provider
items.i3: You will receive an email confirmation once the refund has been initiated, including a refund reference ID
items.i4: For UPI payments, refunds are usually processed within 24–48 hours
items.i5: For credit/debit card payments, refunds may take up to 7–10 business days due to bank processing times

s9.lead: If you wish to downgrade to a lower-tier plan:

items.i1: The downgrade will take effect at the start of your next billing cycle
items.i2: No refund will be issued for the difference between plans during the current billing period
items.i3: You will retain access to higher-tier features until the current period ends

s10.p: We reserve the right to update this Refund & Cancellation Policy at any time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last updated" date. We will notify registered users of significant changes via email. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.

refund.contactIntro: If you have any questions about this Refund & Cancellation Policy, please contact us at:

shipping.title: Shipping & Delivery Policy
shipping.summary1: Flomerce is a digital SaaS product — no physical goods are shipped by us.
shipping.summary2: Access to the platform is granted instantly after payment or trial activation.
shipping.summary3: Your e-commerce site goes live within seconds of creation.
shipping.summary4: Merchants are solely responsible for shipping and delivering products sold on their own stores.

s1.p1: Flomerce is a software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform. All our services are delivered digitally via the internet.
s1.p2: No physical goods are shipped by Flomerce.
s1.p3: There is no physical shipment, courier, or logistics involved in any of our services.

s2.lead1: Upon successful payment or free trial activation, access to the Flomerce platform and all included features is granted

items.i1: Your account is activated instantly after payment confirmation
items.i2: Your e-commerce website is created and live within seconds at your chosen subdomain (e.g., your-store.{{domain}})
items.i3: All subscription features are available immediately upon activation
items.i4: No waiting period or manual activation is required

s3.p: Flomerce is a cloud-based platform accessible 24/7 from any device with an internet connection and a modern web browser. We strive for 99.9% uptime. In case of scheduled maintenance, we will notify users in advance via email.

s4.lead: You can access the Flomerce platform through:

items.i1Post: and log in to your account
items.i2Text: The platform is fully responsive and works on all mobile devices
items.i3Text: Install Flomerce on your device for a native app-like experience

s5.p1: Flomerce enables merchants to create their own e-commerce websites. Shipping and delivery of physical products sold through stores built on Flomerce is the sole responsibility of the respective store owner (merchant). Flomerce does not handle, manage, or take any responsibility for:

items.i1: Shipping or delivery of products sold by merchants on their stores
items.i2: Shipping costs, delivery timelines, or courier services used by merchants
items.i3: Lost, damaged, or delayed shipments of merchant products
items.i4: Returns or exchanges of physical goods sold by merchants

s5.p2: Each store owner is responsible for defining and displaying their own shipping and delivery policies on their respective websites.

shipping.contactIntro: If you have any questions about this Shipping & Delivery Policy, please contact us at:
